evals.expected_output: Skill fetches the Bug ticket, creates/checks out a branch named feature/WEBR-696-... (or bugfix/), assesses Simple tier, prints the summary table, and stops waiting for user to continue.

Skill fetches the Story ticket, creates/checks out a branch named feature/WEBR-698-..., assesses tier (Medium or Complex - depends on logic), prints summary table, and stops waiting for user to continue.
Skill attempts to fetch WEBR-9999, fails (ticket not found), prints the exact error format from the skill (Error: Could not fetch WEBR-9999 + No git operations have been performed), and stops.
